summary: Added Stage 3E structured markdown plan adapter detection, bounded read-only active plan parsing, project seeding integration, focused fixture tests, and durable planning/handoff evidence.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_projects.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
tests_run.summary: 23 passed; covered generic registry behavior, planning SQLite adapter behavior, structured markdown adapter selection, read-only active plan candidate extraction, project-seed-tasks apply behavior, malformed and oversized markdown findings, markerless generic fallback, and target no-mutation checks.
Planning integrity checks passed with the Stage 3E task claimed for implementation.
Story Loop status reported Stage 3E as the current running task before completion was recorded.
397 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Adapter selection identifies observe-saf.evidence: MarkdownPlanAdapter is selected before GenericRepoAdapter when bounded plan markdown includes an observe-safety-plan marker and active plan metadata; markerless plan notes with generic authority markers continue to fall back to generic_repo.

The adapter reads target markdown plan f.evidence: The adapter reads only bounded plans/*.md and plans/active/*.md files, caps file count and byte size, reports malformed or oversized markdown through adapter_findings, and tests assert target markdown bytes remain unchanged.

Active markdown plan work items become d.evidence: Ready/pending/blocked ## Task sections in active marked markdown plans map to markdown-plan-* ProjectTaskCandidate records with source authority, contract fields, stable source IDs, and validation commands.

project-list and project-seed-tasks JSON.evidence: Existing project-list serialization uses the new adapter facts, and focused tests apply markdown plan adapter candidates into a separate supervisor planning DB while preserving the target markdown text.

Focused tests cover valid structured mar.evidence: tests/test_projects.py now contains twenty-three focused tests covering the named Stage 3E behavior plus existing Stage 3A-D project registry behavior.

Planning SQLite and HANDOFF.md record th.evidence: plans/planning.sqlite3 records the Stage 3E task shape and worker run, and HANDOFF.md records the shaped and completed Stage 3E evidence, checks, risks, and next action.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings after focused and full verification. The adapter reads target markdown plans read-only and keeps project-seed-tasks writes scoped to supervisor planning SQLite.

risks: Stage 3 is not fully complete: harness/config and insights graph adapters remain future slices.

The markdown plan adapter intentionally recognizes one bounded observe-safety-plan fixture shape; broader observe-safety-monorepo schema variants may need follow-up support when real fixture evidence is available.
Live Codex Exec launch remains unavailable in this Windows shell because the resolved WindowsApps codex.exe path returns Access is denied.
follow_up_tasks: Shape and implement the codex-subagent-testing harness/config adapter.
Shape and implement the tech-resume insights graph adapter.
Expand the markdown plan adapter if real observe-safety-monorepo schema evidence differs from the public fixture shape.
handoff_notes: Stage 3E adds the second named adapter slice. Continue Stage 3 with harness/config and insights graph adapters before Stage 11 MCP.
